Um, I'm sorry, I, I just shorted out part of my body.
It's very dark in here.
Sonar, mistress of the macabre is in need of power.
Just let me get a flashlight, and, uh, then I'll.
Okay, so I'll just need to check the, uh.
Hello, madame.
Sonar.

Here comes Jade.

Nope.
Fine.
We'll sit with the girl who can't keep her mouth shut and got you fired.
Beck, I swear, if there was anything I could do to make it up to you, I would.
I bet you would.

I'm being weird.
But you.
Oh, I'm not too worried about that.
Being with you just now is so nice.
I mean, taking a trip to a regular grocery store with a regular guy.
In a regular limo?
Yeah, but it felt good to spend the afternoon.
That had nothing to do with the record business.
I mean, to get away from all those people who only act nice to you because they want something.
You run into a lot of those, huh?
Yeah.
Even my grandmother sends me demo tapes.
So what were you afraid was weird?

source_doc:
Laverne, you you forget about moving.
I want you to call down.
I want to reserve the auditorium for tomorrow.
Then call every doctor in this building and tell them to be there for a rally.
We are going to fight this.
The great Kirk Corporation.
Well, it's an uphill battle against these corporations.
But I'm with you all the way.
It's like my daddy used to say, never give up a pediatrics office without a fight.
Your daddy said that?
Well, actually, he said about a whiskey still.
But I'm adapting it to the present situation.

The last time I was out here, you could see 27 miles across northwest Alabama.
You getting tired of the view?
No.
The trouble is that the birds keep on flying into the glass because they can't see it and break their wings.
Well, why don't you just throw an old fishnet over the window?
That way you'd have your view and your birds.
Well, I just guess and calculate.
I never thought of it.
You know, I swear, if a fly was to bust his leg, he'd come running with a splint.

@Maker_of_Things
Is there any bruising or swelling? If it’s swelling then let the practice know and keep an eye on it.
Assuming she took it from the veins around the elbow, theres a chance she went too deep and hit the back wall of the vein, and an underlying tendon then bruised it on the way out. All depends on technique and equipment. I could never get the hang of a fixed needle draw but was a deft hand at a butterfly draw, you could be much kinder.
Hope it’s eased now.

@tempusfelix
Yeah, from my elbow. It is still sore, but getting better. No bruising or bleeding though.

@Maker_of_Things
Good. She may well have been too deep so remember if they’re not urgent, you can often ask for a specific practitioner if your surgery allows it. For example I like the sister at mine, she’s so smooth.

那就好。她很可能真的扎太深了，所以記得如果不是急事，而且你的診所有這種安排的話，通常可以要求指定某位醫護人員。像我就很喜歡我那邊的護理師，她技術超順的。

If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. source_doc:
Ironing the lightweight green corduroy for my first try at the Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern. I don't know how I feel about the recommendation to use interfacing but it probably does want something to stiffen and thicken it a bit.
#millinery

Sachi's newsboy cap pattern advises to cut the crown pieces diagonal to the weave ("on the bias") to allow more stretch around the circumference but that will make the corduroy rows run aslant, where I prefer them vertical.
We shall see. This is the test cookie to get a feel for the pattern. I like corduroy for texture but green wouldn't be my first choice, and this fabric is lightweight enough that I should add a layer, whether interfacing or what-have-you from the stash.

On a second look, my fabric isn't corduroy at all, it's just velvet, so I can cut at 45° to the fabric weave like Sachi suggests in the Newsboy Cap pattern and it won't look strange.
#millinery
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. hypo_0:
我在熨這塊輕薄的綠色燈芯絨，第一次試做 Sachi's Studio 的報童帽版型。對於建議要用襯布這件事，我還不知道自己怎麼想，但它大概的確需要點東西讓它更挺、也厚一點。
#製帽

Sachi 的報童帽版型建議把帽冠的布片沿著布紋斜裁（「斜紋裁」），這樣帽圍那圈會比較有彈性，但這也會讓燈芯絨的條紋變成斜的，而我比較喜歡它們是垂直的。
再看看吧。這頂是試做品，只是先摸摸這個版型的感覺。我喜歡燈芯絨的質感，但綠色不會是我的第一選擇，而且這塊布夠薄，我應該要再加一層，不管是襯布還是我庫存裡隨便什麼都行。

再看一次之後，我這塊布根本不是燈芯絨，是天鵝絨，所以我可以照 Sachi 在報童帽版型裡建議的那樣，沿著布紋 45° 斜裁，也不會看起來很怪。
#製帽

source_doc:
Melody, what has come over you?
You are not my mother.
Just stop it and go.
It's fine, it's fine.
Whatever.
And next time you knock, I get to come in before you come in.
What have I done wrong?

source_doc:
I wish alcohol wasn't such a normal gift in society 😅 My employer sent me a bottle of eggnog but the only alcohol we like is in alcohol markers

I guess "not liking it" is kinda poor wording, I just think it's weird how casual we are with this stuff and we somehow just assume that all adults love this shit when there's people who shouldn't be touching it ever, and frankly I think the world would be better off if I poured it into the toilet than even gifting it to someone

@doombloomart
I have had US Big Corp required sensitivity training that reminds people not everyone wants alcohol and it's inappropriate to ask why. Seems like that should be more common

@elithebearded Yeah, that's mostly what I wish for too. I get that with sending random shit to a whole corporation will never be inoffensive to everyone, but 1. don't send random shit to a whole corporation maybe and 2. alcohol just rubs me wrong in the way that many who shouldn't touch it may touch it when it randomly shows up at the doorstep. 😅

source_doc:
I am waiting, professor.
Well, what do you see in my hand?
I see the hand of a of a charming young man.
Within the next few months Lord Arthur will go on a voyage.
Naturally, his honeymoon.
And lose a relative.
Well, we all lose relatives.
Sometimes I think they were created for the purpose.
Can you tell us any more?
No, Lady Clementine.
That's all I can say.

source_doc:
Jeff Pickles is a TV personality.
That personality hasn't changed and can't change because that's the world of the show.
There's two of you.
There's Mr. Pickles, and then there's Jeff.
And never the two should meet in order to prevent the destruction of them both.
When he's subjected to a personal tragedy, he has to go back to work the next day and still be the same person.
Hey there.
Thump, thump.
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. hypo_0: Jeff Pickles 是一位電視名人。那個人物形象沒有變，也不能變，因為那就是這個節目的世界。有兩個你。一個是 Pickles 先生，另一個是 Jeff。兩者絕不能碰在一起，否則為了避免兩邊都毀掉，就必須分開。當他遭逢個人悲劇時，他隔天還是得回去工作，而且還得維持同樣的樣子。嘿，你好。砰砰。

source_doc:
I just had a very nice #dream that I made friends with Lee Chaeyeon. I just started talking to her nand the next thing I know, I have stayed over her house (like when the French kidnapped me for Christmas) and she is telling me to go up stairs and "shuffle up a little bit" (her English was generally excellent) by which she meant "tidy up a little bit" to show her mom we were ready to eat.
She comes upstairs to "shuffle up" her room and starts making gestures to explain what she means ...
1/

(she was always so excited to see me in this dream) because I was taking my coat off instead of "shuffling up."
Then she indicates this little piece of paper and says she has left me an autograph but in return she wants this little trading card I made in second grade of "50 Spikes," a sonic knock-off, obviously with more spikes. (This card actually exists IRL BTW). I start explaining to her what it is and if she really wants it (she did) I at least needed a picture of her holding it.
2/

Partly because I would miss it, but also, otherwise no one would believe me that she had wanted this thing from me.
It was then I realized we still didn't have each others' phone numbers.
3/3

hypo_0:
我剛剛做了一個超棒的#夢，夢到我跟李彩演變成朋友了。我就只是開始跟她聊天，結果下一秒我就已經住到她家了（就像法國人聖誕節把我綁走那次一樣），然後她叫我上樓去「稍微整理一下」（她英文整體來說超好），她其實是想說「稍微收拾一下」，好讓她媽媽知道我們準備好可以吃飯了。
她上樓來「整理」她房間，然後開始比手畫腳解釋她的意思……
1/

（她在這個夢裡每次看到我都超興奮）因為我那時候是在脫外套，不是在「整理」。
接著她指著這張小紙片，說她留了一張簽名給我，但交換條件是她想要我小學二年級做的這張「50 Spikes」小卡，一個很明顯是在模仿音速小子的角色，只是刺更多。（順帶一提，這張卡在現實中真的存在）。我就開始跟她解釋那是什麼，還有如果她真的想要的話（她真的想要），我至少得拍一張她拿著它的照片。
2/

一部分是因為我會捨不得，但也是因為不然根本不會有人相信她居然會想跟我要這個東西。
那時我才意識到，我們甚至還沒有彼此的手機號碼。
3/3

hypo_7:
我剛剛做了一個超美好的#夢，夢到我跟李彩演變成朋友。我才剛開始跟她聊天，結果下一秒回過神來，我已經住到她家去了（就像我之前聖誕節被法國人綁走那次一樣），然後她叫我上樓去「稍微整理一下」（她英文其實整體來說超好），她的意思其實是「稍微收拾一下」，好讓她媽媽知道我們已經準備好可以吃飯了。
接著她也上樓來「稍微整理」她的房間，還開始比手畫腳地跟我解釋她的意思……
1/

（她在這個夢裡每次看到我都超興奮）因為我那時候正在脫外套，而不是在「稍微整理」。
然後她指著一小張紙，跟我說她留了一個簽名給我，但交換條件是，她想要我小學二年級做的一張「50 Spikes」交換卡，一個很明顯是 Sonic 山寨版、只是刺更多的角色。（順帶一提，這張卡在現實中真的存在啦。）我就開始跟她解釋那到底是什麼，而且如果她真的想要（她是真的想要），那我至少得拍一張她拿著那張卡的照片。
2/

一方面是因為我會捨不得，但另一方面也是因為，不然根本不會有人相信，她居然會想要跟我拿這種東西。
也就是在那時候，我才意識到我們居然連彼此的手機號碼都還沒有。
3/3

source_doc:
right, so, as i was saying, i dmed this very well known and very friendly seeming artist-type person and gave em the usual spiel:
- how bridge works
- how to bridge
- please do so because i want to follow you and reblog some of your stuff that i like
- if you don't want to, that's fine
and they responded "not doing that" which is all well and good but then they blocked me???
just like, for absolutely no fucking reason

not naming any names because i do NOT dislike anybody involved and i certainly do not want to incite any brigading, but this has happened with several people now, including people who have REBLOGGED AND LIKED BRIDGED POSTS FROM THIS ACCOUNT (my main), which is WHY I WANTED TO FOLLOW THEM

if they had just said "no thanks" they would have gotten an "ok, perfectly understandable! :)" or the like from me, but now everyone has to put up with my confused ranting instead. i'm not even angry, i'm just *genuinely baffled*

bsky people, is this a genuine issue over on your platform (because it's one i've almost *never* had over here on this side of the bridge) or am i just running into bad apple after bad apple

I honestly don't know what people's general feelings are about enabling the Bridgy Fed here, because that's just not a topic that ever comes up tbh (unfortunately)… But there's definitely some subset of people here who are super trigger-happy about the block button, I'm not a fan of this either.

hypo_0:
對，總之，就像我剛剛說的，我私訊了一位很有名、看起來也很友善的藝術家類型的人，然後跟對方講了平常那套：
- bridge 是怎麼運作的
- 要怎麼 bridge
- 拜託開一下，因為我想追蹤你，然後轉噗一些我喜歡的內容
- 如果你不想，也完全沒關係
結果對方回我一句「不要」；這本來也沒什麼，但接著居然直接封鎖我???
真的就是，完全他媽毫無理由

我不點名，因為我並不討厭任何牽涉到的人，當然也完全不想煽動任何人去出征；但這種事現在已經發生在好幾個人身上了，甚至還包括一些有轉噗和按讚過這個帳號（我的主帳）發出去的 bridged 貼文的人，所以我才會想追蹤他們啊

如果他們只是回一句「不用了，謝謝」，我本來也只會回個「喔喔，完全可以理解！:)」之類的，但現在大家反而得忍受我這串困惑碎念。我甚至不是在生氣，我只是*真的很傻眼*

bsky 的各位，這在你們那個平台上是很常見的問題嗎（因為在橋的這一邊，我幾乎*從來*沒遇過這種事），還是只是我一直剛好碰到一個又一個雷包

老實說，我真的不知道這裡大家對啟用 Bridgy Fed 的整體看法是什麼，因為說真的這根本不是個會被拿出來討論的話題（可惜了）……但這邊的確有一部分人對封鎖鍵超級手快，我自己也不太喜歡這樣。

Yeah, yeah, yeah.
I think there are people underneath.
You didn't go to sleep till 2:00.
I'm a sad little puppy.
Oh.
It wasn't because we were bothering each other.
It's because the bunk was uncomfortable.
Okay.
It was comfortable for me.
Ellie, what are you doing?
It was weird.
Yeah, it was a weird night.
Are you trying to sneak the snacks?

我是覺得還滿舒服的。
Ellie，你在幹嘛？
感覺怪怪的。
對啊，昨晚真是怪怪的一晚。
你是不是想偷拿零食？

source_doc:
Where is he, Bill?
Out there.
Don't you girls back down tonight?
We got a surprise for you.
That sounds exciting.
Tommy, just you wait and see.
Hello?
Hello.
Hello, Jim.
They told me it was somebody about the hall for tonight.
You don't think they'd let me in the kitchen if they knew I was organizing the strike, do you?
You're pretty smart, aren't you?
Can you get away?
Yes.
Give me one minute to change my dress.

source_doc:
Tonight in #MMRPG! My back finally shuts up enough that I can GM again as the heroes continue their search for the missing girl Cammie. Vega the Digital Dragon surprises a trio of mischievous scamps who snuck into her arcade in the middle of the night but one of them recognizes her as a town superhero and they end up having a heartwarming moment geeking out over video games. Unfortunately, the moment is interrupted by somebody or something landing on the roof of the arcade... 1/?

Vega goes to investigate and finds Dr. Vesper, in his monstrous bat form that the press has dubbed the "Gargoyle Man," along with a harpy-like creature that Vesper describes as his "little protegee." Vesper says that they have come to introduce themselves and invite Vega to join their society of man-creature misfits that is led by "The Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton of the Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega buys some time to get the mischievous scamps out of the arcade and call the rest of the Mythics for backup, then plays along at being interested in joining this "new family." Vesper and Harpy (who does not speak once during the interaction) lead Vega to a ship in the harbor, where the Laughton Institute appears to be packing up their things... presumably because they know they're drawing attention from Agent Carter and A.R.G.E.N.T. among others. 3/?
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0:
今晚在#大型多人角色扮演遊戲！我的背終於安分到讓我又能當GM了，英雄們也繼續尋找失蹤女孩 Cammie。數位龍 Vega 半夜在自己的遊樂場裡，逮到三個偷偷溜進來搗蛋的小鬼，結果其中一個居然認出她是鎮上的超級英雄，然後大家就超暖地一起宅聊電玩起來。不過，這個瞬間很快就被某個人或某個東西降落在遊樂場屋頂上的動靜打斷了……1/?

Vega 去查看後，發現是 Dr. Vesper，他正處於那種被媒體稱作「石像鬼男」的怪物蝙蝠型態，身邊還帶著一個像哈比一樣的生物，Vesper 說那是他的「小徒弟」。Vesper 表示他們是來打招呼的，也想邀請 Vega 加入他們這個由「夫人」——Laughton Institute 的 Dr. Diana Laughton——帶領的人獸怪咖社群。2/?

Vega 先拖時間，好讓那三個搗蛋小鬼離開遊樂場，順便打給其他 Mythics 叫支援，接著再假裝對加入這個「新家庭」很有興趣。Vesper 和 Harpy（整段互動中一句話都沒說）帶著 Vega 前往港口的一艘船，在那裡，Laughton Institute 看起來正在收拾東西準備撤離……大概是因為他們知道自己已經引起了 Agent Carter、A.R.G.E.N.T. 等人的注意。3/?

今晚在#大型多人角色扮演遊戲！我的背總算沒那麼吵了，終於又能當 GM，英雄們也繼續追查失蹤少女 Cammie 的下落。數位之龍 Vega 撞見三個半夜偷溜進她遊樂場搗蛋的小鬼，不過其中一個認出她是鎮上的超級英雄，結果大家反而一起暖暖地聊起電玩，整個宅魂大爆發。可惜這段溫馨時刻，很快就被某個人——或者某個東西——落在遊樂場屋頂上的聲響打斷了…… 1/?

Vega 前去查看，發現是 Dr. Vesper，還是以那副被媒體稱作「石像鬼男」的怪物蝙蝠形態現身，身邊還跟著一個像哈比的生物，Vesper 稱她是自己的「小徒弟」。Vesper 表示，他們是來自我介紹，也想邀請 Vega 加入他們這個由「夫人」——Laughton Institute 的 Dr. Diana Laughton——所領導的人類與異形邊緣人團體。 2/?

Vega 先拖了點時間，好讓那幾個搗蛋小鬼離開遊樂場，並叫其他 Mythics 趕來支援，接著再順勢裝作對加入這個「新家庭」很有興趣。Vesper 和 Harpy（她在整段互動裡一句話都沒說）帶著 Vega 來到港口的一艘船上，而 Laughton Institute 看起來正忙著收拾東西準備撤離……大概是因為他們也知道，自己已經引起了 Agent Carter、A.R.G.E.N.T. 等人的注意。 3/?

source_doc:
@Edent ah, interesting - was the Hub 5 something you had to request from Virgin, or did you just get one elsewhere and set it up? (As per recent discussion was issued with a 5x, with its lack Modem Mode.)

@yvan I already had the Hub 4. I went onto their online chat and whinged about poor download speeds until they sent me a new Hub.
If you're on the XPON network, I don't think you have a choice though.

@Edent ah yeah, just been trying to do some research, but it's all a bit muddy... I'm FTTP/XGS-PON so I think just stuck with the 5x... not an insurmountable problem, just a little annoying. (But compared to unreliable <40mpbs BT rotting fenland copper that cost me more than Virgin... I'm not really complaining.)
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. hypo_0:
@Edent 啊，真有意思——Hub 5 是你得跟 Virgin 申請才拿到的，還是你直接從別的地方弄一台來自己設定？（照最近的討論來看，應該是配到 5x，畢竟它沒有 Modem Mode。）

@yvan 我本來就有 Hub 4 了。我跑去他們的線上客服聊天，抱怨下載速度很爛，抱怨到他們寄一台新的 Hub 給我。
不過如果你是在 XPON 網路上，我覺得你應該沒得選。

@Edent 啊對，我剛剛也一直在查資料，但資訊都有點模糊……我是 FTTP/XGS-PON，所以我想大概就只能卡在 5x 了……也不是什麼無法解決的大問題啦，就只是有點煩。（不過跟那個不穩、不到 40mpbs 的 BT 爛到快爛光的沼澤地銅線比起來，而且還比 Virgin 更貴……我其實也沒什麼好抱怨的。）
hypo_1:
@Edent 啊，滿有意思的——Hub 5 是你得另外跟 Virgin 申請，還是你自己從別的地方弄一台來設定？（照最近的討論看來，現在發的好像是 5x，而且它沒有 Modem Mode。）

@yvan 我本來就有 Hub 4 了。我跑去他們的線上客服抱怨下載速度太差，唸到最後他們就寄了一台新的 Hub 給我。
不過如果你是在 XPON 網路上，我覺得你應該沒得選就是了。

@Edent 啊對，我剛剛也一直在查資料，但資訊都有點霧煞煞的……我是 FTTP/XGS-PON，所以感覺大概就是被綁在 5x 了……也不是什麼不能克服的大問題啦，只是有點煩而已。（不過跟那種又不穩、速度不到 40mpbs，還比 Virgin 更貴的 BT 沼澤區老舊銅線比起來……我其實也沒有真的在抱怨啦。）

@yvan 我本來就有 Hub 4 了。我去敲他們的線上客服，一直抱怨下載速度太爛，最後他們就寄了一台新的 Hub 給我。
不過如果你是在 XPON 網路上，我覺得你應該沒得選啦。

source_doc:
Is this the final Stranger Things?
Is this it?
Has it been quite emotional?
I know you can't really tell us how it ends then, but like you reading those scripts and going through it and stuff, was it just.
Well, I haven't read the end.
I know what happens to my character.
Um, because I kind of forced myself into the writers room.
Um, so you broke in and found out?
Yes.
Basically I messaged the directors and thought, can I come over and have a meeting with you?
And then I came over and then there was a whiteboard.
So you've written your own ending?

source_doc:
i am hesitant to declare it but i may be right around the point of behavior calculation optimization where there's nothing more that can be done without actually decimating the number of paths being processed.
And that might actually be the play because things like UCT are smarter about traversing a tree with a budget and splitting how deep vs broad you go

at the end of the day, it's always going to be possible that some enemy picks up some combination of abilities/items where the combinatorial explosion of possibility space is unable to calculate fast on any hardware, so I was always going to need to cap it somewhere, just that theoretical cap is now 40x bigger than it was in january

Welp think I'm going to implement UCT because my game's just Go now this is going to be a journey

Jade, if you want to get back together with Beck, then why don't you just tell him?
I did, but he rejected me.
Um, not to be mean, but why are you coming to me for help?
Because I don't want anyone who's cool to see me like this.
Okay, maybe you should wait.
Are we.
We're not even friends.
Well, yeah, but if you help me.
Maybe I'll like you.
So if I help you, I get a mean friend and a broken kite.
Please, just please talk to Beck for me.

source_doc:
Traction meets fashion: The best weatherproof trainers for rain-slicked pavements

The Cloudhorizon Waterproof feels purpose-built for the stop-start rhythm of winter commuting. Its lightweight waterproof upper keeps your feet dry without adding bulk, and the shoe's smooth rocker shape helps you roll forward easily, even when you're layered up and carrying heavy loads.

Underfoot, Helion foam creates a cushioned bounce that softens long walks between stations, while the grippy rubber outsole keeps things steady on wet steps and shiny tiles. The pared-back design gives it a polished, modern look, ideal if you prefer a trainer that handles lousy weather subtly, without shouting its technical credentials.

source_doc:
:redpanda: sometimes people will ask us like "what if you got a publisher for [game] wouldn't that be wicked?" but the problem is that all that would have to go through our game director, Ashe, who's said she wont speak to any publisher who doesn't address her as Ashe
the second she gets "Jess" the deal ends

:redpanda: and in a world where like, not even the AI slop publishers sending AI emails, but the people who have been flat out rude and some of them like, you could *feel* the misogyny dripping off their email, we're not really interested in talking to any of them lol

:redpanda: (I will shout out the publishers who have reached out to us though who have been like "here's some of the games we've published" and, out of their catalog, they picked out exclusively furry games. at least they did their homework)

:redpanda: anyways if you ever were like "I don't understand why Blobun isn't on switch? it'd be a perfect fit" that's why, and we can't afford the devkit and version of gamemaker that does that export, so yea you gotta go steam deck (or x86-ARM converter on those anbernics) if you want it on the go

hypo_0:
:redpanda: 有時候大家會問我們說「如果你們有 [game] 的發行商，不是超讚嗎？」但問題是，這一切都得先經過我們的遊戲總監 Ashe，而她早就說過，任何不叫她 Ashe 的發行商，她都不會談
她只要一看到有人叫她「Jess」，合作就直接結束

:redpanda: 而且在這個世界上，別說那些連 AI 廢文發行商寄來的 AI 信件都很瞎，就連有些真人寄來的信也直接超沒禮貌，甚至有些你根本能感覺到信裡滿滿都是厭女味，我們真的沒什麼興趣跟那些人聊啦 lol

:redpanda: （不過我還是要稱讚一下那些有來聯絡我們的發行商，他們會先說「這裡是我們發行過的一些遊戲」，然後從他們的作品目錄裡挑出來介紹的，居然清一色都是獸人遊戲。至少他們有先做功課）

:redpanda: 總之，如果你以前有想過「我不懂為什麼 Blobun 沒上 switch？明明超適合啊」——原因就在這，而且我們也買不起 devkit 跟能做那個匯出的 gamemaker 版本，所以對啊，如果你想帶著玩，就只能用 steam deck（或是那些 anbernics 上的 x86-ARM 轉換器）了

:redpanda: 總之，如果你曾經想過「我真的不懂 Blobun 為什麼沒上 Switch？明明就超適合啊」，原因就是這個，而且我們也買不起 devkit，還有能做那個匯出功能的 GameMaker 版本，所以對啊，你如果想帶著玩，就只能用 Steam Deck（或那些 Anbernic 上的 x86-ARM 轉換器）了。

instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):

source_doc:
```json
[
  "Lookin’ Good",
  "Boost Your Business !",
  "Shoppable Instagram Posts are just a few clicks away",
  "Let customers order directly from your Instagram posts when you’re powered by Mambalo.",
  "Tap to tag products",
  "Home decor for lovely places like yours",
  "Unleash the power of email with Mailchimp",
  "Use your Mambalo purchase data to segment your email list and create targeted campaigns for current and potential customers.",
  "Share discount coupons",
  "Collect emails with a sign-up form",
  "Short on time? Make ‘em automated",
  "Unleash the power of email with MailChimp",
  "Facebook & Google Retargeting: How to Turn Your Visitors Into Customers",
  "Every visitor on your site is an opportunity to make a sale.",
  "You can sit and wait when your visitors remember your brand, or… You can bring customers back to your online store with remarketing. And that’s no rocket science — read this article to learn how to get started.",
  "Facebook retargeting ads will appear on Facebook sites, and they get about two billion visits every month.",
  "The word “dynamic” in the term means that something in the ads changes – in this case, the items displayed in the ad. To give you a proper understanding of how it works, let’s go through some examples.",
  "We also have a visitor named Janet. Janet also finds the Awesome Super Shoes store on Google. She likes our Red Shoes, but it is four days to her payday and she is short on cash, so she leaves the store website without making a purchase.",
  "Five days later, she is on Facebook, browsing her friends’ posts. Between the posts, she can see an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Red Shoes she already liked. Since she got her paycheck yesterday, she decides to spoil herself and buy the shoes.",
  "In the evening, he goes through several review sites about running shoes. Since most of the sites are on the Google Display Network, one of them runs an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Running Shoes Jared has already looked at. He hasn’t found better shoes yet and he’s quite tired, so he decides to buy the Running Shoes.",
  "And that is what dynamic retargeting is about. No matter how visitors get to your webpage, if they don’t purchase anything, they’ll see your ads with the product they were interested in.",
  "Hit launch campaign and that’s it. No coding, no messing with CSV files, no stress. The process is the same for Google remarketing ads.",
  "We can’t wait to learn how you’re doing retargeting in your Mambalo store. Tell us in the comments below!"
]
```
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is from software data. Translate the content of json, without translating keys and placeholders (i.e. copy them rather than translate them). Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Produce a valid json output that matches the input format. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0: ["看起來真不錯","為您的商家加把勁！","可購買的 Instagram 貼文只需幾個點擊即可完成","使用 Mambalo 後，讓顧客可直接從您的 Instagram 貼文下單。","點一下即可標記商品","為像您這樣可愛的空間打造的居家裝飾","用 Mailchimp 釋放電子郵件的力量","使用您的 Mambalo 購買資料來區分電子郵件名單，並為現有與潛在顧客建立精準行銷活動。","分享折扣優惠券","用註冊表單蒐集電子郵件","沒時間？把它們設成自動化","用 MailChimp 釋放電子郵件的力量","Facebook 與 Google 再行銷：如何將訪客變成顧客","您網站上的每位訪客，都是一次成交的機會。","您可以坐等訪客想起您的品牌，或者……您也可以透過再行銷把顧客帶回您的網路商店。而這一點也不難——閱讀這篇文章，了解如何開始。","Facebook 再行銷廣告會出現在 Facebook 旗下網站上，每月約有二十億次瀏覽。","這個詞中的「動態」表示廣告中的某些內容會改變——在這裡指的是廣告中顯示的商品。為了讓您更清楚了解它的運作方式，我們來看幾個例子。","我們還有一位名叫 Janet 的訪客。Janet 也在 Google 上找到 Awesome Super Shoes 商店。她喜歡我們的紅鞋，但距離發薪日還有四天，手頭有點緊，所以她沒有購買就離開了商店網站。","五天後，她正在 Facebook 上瀏覽朋友的貼文。在貼文之間，她看到了 Awesome Super Shoes 的廣告，裡面正是她先前喜歡的紅鞋。由於她昨天剛領到薪水，便決定犒賞自己，把鞋子買下來。","到了晚上，他瀏覽了幾個關於跑鞋的評測網站。由於這些網站大多屬於 Google 多媒體廣告聯播網，其中一個網站投放了 Awesome Super Shoes 的廣告，展示 Jared 先前看過的跑鞋。他還沒找到更好的鞋，而且也有點累了，所以決定買下這雙跑鞋。","這就是動態再行銷的核心。不論訪客是如何來到您的網頁，只要他們沒有購買任何商品，就會看到展示他們感興趣商品的廣告。","按一下啟動行銷活動，就完成了。無需寫程式、無需處理 CSV 檔案、毫無壓力。Google 再行銷廣告的流程也是一樣。","我們迫不及待想了解您如何在 Mambalo 商店中進行再行銷。歡迎在下方留言告訴我們！"]
hypo_1: ["真好看","為您的業務加速成長！","可購買的 Instagram 貼文，只差幾個點擊","透過 Mambalo，讓顧客可直接從您的 Instagram 貼文下單購買。","輕點即可標記商品","為像您這樣美好空間打造的居家裝飾","用 Mailchimp 釋放電子郵件行銷的力量","善用您的 Mambalo 購買資料來細分電子郵件名單，並為現有與潛在顧客建立精準的行銷活動。","分享折扣優惠券","使用註冊表單蒐集電子郵件","時間不夠？交給自動化","用 MailChimp 釋放電子郵件行銷的力量","Facebook 與 Google 再行銷：如何把訪客變成顧客","您網站上的每位訪客，都是一次成交機會。","您可以坐等訪客想起您的品牌，或者……透過再行銷，主動把顧客帶回您的網路商店。這一點也不複雜——閱讀這篇文章，了解該如何開始。","Facebook 再行銷廣告會顯示在 Facebook 旗下網站上，而這些網站每月約有 20 億次造訪。","這個詞中的「動態」表示廣告中的某些內容會改變——在這裡，改變的是廣告中顯示的商品。為了讓您更清楚了解它的運作方式，我們來看幾個例子。","我們還有一位名叫 Janet 的訪客。Janet 也在 Google 上找到 Awesome Super Shoes 商店。她喜歡我們的紅鞋，但距離發薪日還有四天，手頭有點緊，所以沒有購買就離開了商店網站。","五天後，她正在 Facebook 上瀏覽朋友的貼文。在貼文之間，她看到了 Awesome Super Shoes 的廣告，裡面正是她先前喜歡的紅鞋。由於她昨天剛領到薪水，便決定犒賞自己，把這雙鞋買下來。","到了晚上，他瀏覽了幾個關於跑鞋的評測網站。由於這些網站大多屬於 Google 多媒體廣告聯播網，其中一個網站顯示了 Awesome Super Shoes 的廣告，展示 Jared 先前看過的跑鞋。他還沒找到更好的鞋，又有些疲倦，於是決定買下這雙跑鞋。","這就是動態再行銷的運作方式。不論訪客是如何來到您的網頁，只要他們沒有購買任何商品，就會看到展示他們感興趣商品的廣告。","按一下啟動行銷活動，就大功告成。不用寫程式、不用處理 CSV 檔案、毫無壓力。Google 再行銷廣告的流程也是一樣。","我們很想知道您如何在 Mambalo 商店中進行再行銷。歡迎在下方留言與我們分享！"]
hypo_2: ["真有型","為您的事業加把勁！","可購買的 Instagram 貼文，幾個點擊就能完成","透過 Mambalo，讓顧客直接從您的 Instagram 貼文下單購買。","輕點即可標註商品","為像您這樣的美好空間打造居家裝飾","用 Mailchimp 釋放電子郵件行銷的威力","運用您的 Mambalo 購買資料來細分電子郵件名單，並為現有與潛在顧客建立精準行銷活動。","分享折扣優惠券","用註冊表單蒐集電子郵件","沒時間？交給自動化","用 MailChimp 釋放電子郵件行銷的威力","Facebook 與 Google 再行銷：如何把訪客變成顧客","您網站上的每一位訪客，都是一次成交的機會。","您可以坐等訪客想起您的品牌，或者……透過再行銷，把顧客帶回您的網路商店。這一點也不難——閱讀這篇文章，了解該如何開始。","Facebook 再行銷廣告會顯示在 Facebook 相關網站上，而這些網站每月約有 20 億次造訪。","詞語中的「動態」代表廣告中的某些內容會改變——在這裡，改變的是廣告中顯示的商品。為了讓您更清楚了解它如何運作，我們來看幾個例子。","我們還有一位名叫 Janet 的訪客。Janet 也在 Google 上找到 Awesome Super Shoes 商店。她喜歡我們的紅鞋，但距離發薪日還有四天，手頭有點緊，因此沒有購買就離開了商店網站。","五天後，她正在 Facebook 上瀏覽朋友的貼文。在貼文之間，她看到了 Awesome Super Shoes 的廣告，裡面正是她先前喜歡的紅鞋。由於她昨天剛領到薪水，便決定犒賞自己，把這雙鞋買下來。","到了晚上，他瀏覽了幾個關於跑鞋的評測網站。由於這些網站大多屬於 Google 多媒體廣告聯播網，其中一個網站顯示了 Awesome Super Shoes 的廣告，展示 Jared 先前看過的跑鞋。他還沒找到更好的鞋，而且已經有點累了，於是決定買下這雙跑鞋。","這就是動態再行銷的核心概念。不論訪客是如何來到您的網頁，只要他們沒有購買任何商品，就會看到展示他們感興趣商品的廣告。","按下啟動行銷活動，就大功告成。不用寫程式、不用處理 CSV 檔案、毫無壓力。Google 再行銷廣告的流程也是一樣。","我們很期待知道您如何在 Mambalo 商店中運用再行銷。歡迎在下方留言與我們分享！"]

source_doc:
Oh my God.
I'm so sorry.
I didn't see you.
No no no no, I'm sorry, I.
I should have been walking slower.
Uh, anyways, I gotta go.

source_doc:
$partner has a video consult with Ikea to quote for a fitted kitchen. It's a fascinating glimpse into the ecosystem of online services for boomers.
1. They send link for video consult, three weeks ago. It uses Ikea's proprietary videoconf solution
2. They request the designs & 3D renders for the new kitchen
3. they send an email saying "thanks for sending through the design
4. We dial in today, they start the call with "our system blocked your files, let's design your kitchen together"
1/x

5. Partner asks if there's any way to share the (very detailed, took us like a full man week to put together) designs, but the Ikea salesdrone is on a script, and isn't having a bar of it.
6. The next step in the script is "laboriously do the design from scratch over the phone with the client, hunting and pecking on the keyboard and not fast using the UI of their design software"
2/x

7. They cannot share their screen, so it's a clown show of repeated misunderstanding about which part of which image is being referred to

8. the clock has just ticked past what should have been the full consult, and they're 35% the way thru getting the required measurements.

9. So far there's been literally 8 minutes of salesdrone laboriously inputting the measurements supplied
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0:
$partner 要跟 Ikea 做一次視訊諮詢，好報價做訂製廚房。這根本是窺看線上服務怎麼服務嬰兒潮世代生態系的超有趣一幕。
1. 他們三週前寄了視訊諮詢連結。用的是 Ikea 自家的視訊會議方案
2. 他們要求提供新廚房的設計圖跟 3D 渲染圖
3. 他們寄了一封 email 說：「謝謝你傳來設計圖
4. 我們今天一接上線，他們開場就說：「我們系統把你的檔案擋掉了，來一起設計你的廚房吧」
1/x

5. 另一半問有沒有任何方法可以分享那些（超級詳細，我們大概花了一整個人週才弄好）的設計圖，但 Ikea 那個業務機器人完全照稿走，根本不接受。
6. 腳本的下一步是：「跟客戶在電話上苦哈哈地從零開始做設計，一邊慢吞吞用鍵盤戳來戳去，而且對他們設計軟體的介面也不熟」
2/x

7. 他們沒辦法分享螢幕，所以整場就像場鬧劇，不斷反覆誤會到底是在講哪張圖的哪個部分

8. 時間已經走過原本整場諮詢該結束的點了，而他們才做到取得所需尺寸的 35%。

9. 到目前為止，真的有整整 8 分鐘都只是那個業務機器人在苦哈哈地把提供好的尺寸慢慢輸進去

source_doc:
Local stable out to cash in at Coffs with four contenders

Local trainer Noel Mayfield-Smith is hoping to have a lucrative day at Sunday's Coffs Harbour meeting with four runners stepping out for the stable on the six-race card.

The Group 1-winning horseman will start his day in the second event of the day when Ausbred Yahoo contests the Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m) with two-kilogram claiming apprentice Ella Drew taking the ride.

Racing returns to Coffs Harbour on Sunday.

Ausbred Yahoo has been racing in good form with a third placing at Kempsey three starts ago being followed by two successive seconds at Coffs Harbour, the latest when beaten by Sunday's rival Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith links with another apprentice, three-kilogram claimer Leanne Boyd, when Never Island starts in the Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

A winner of three of her 15 starts, Never Island will carry 59.5 kilograms after Boyd's allowance. Never Island was beaten less than a length when second behind Montgomery at Grafton and backed that up with a last-start fifth at Coffs Harbour behind In The Fine Print when again beaten less than a length.

Raymond Spokes takes the ride on the Mayfield-Smith-prepared Monte Cruise in the O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise is also a three-time winner from just the nine starts. She hasn't raced since July when finishing last of eight at Eagle Farm and has had two trials at this track in preparation for her return, finishing second behind Saturday's Wyong winner Petticoat before winning the latest of them.

Mayfield-Smith rounds out the day when he again links with Boyd when she rides Cardsharp in the Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

hypo_0:
當地馬房派出四駒角逐科夫斯賽事，盼搶得豐厚獎金

本地練馬師諾爾・梅菲爾德－史密斯希望在週日科夫斯港賽馬日迎來豐收，旗下馬房將於這張六場賽事的賽程中派出四匹賽駒上陣。

這位曾贏得一級賽的練馬師，將於當天第二場賽事揭開序幕，屆時Ausbred Yahoo將出戰Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58讓賽（1605公尺），由可減磅2公斤的見習騎師艾拉・德魯策騎。

科夫斯港將於週日恢復舉辦賽事。

Ausbred Yahoo近期表現不俗，三仗前於肯普西跑獲季軍，之後在科夫斯港連續兩仗取得亞軍，最近一次則不敵本週日同場對手Caledonian。

梅菲爾德－史密斯將再度與另一位見習騎師合作，由可減磅3公斤的莉安・博伊德策騎Never Island，出戰Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks雌馬Benchmark 58讓賽（1305公尺）。

Never Island在15次出賽中贏得3場頭馬，在博伊德減磅後將負重59.5公斤。牠此前於格拉夫頓以不到一個馬位之差屈居Montgomery之後得第二，接著上仗在科夫斯港再以不到一個馬位之差不敵In The Fine Print，取得第五名。

雷蒙德・史波克斯將策騎由梅菲爾德－史密斯訓練的Monte Cruise，出戰O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82讓賽（1205公尺）。

Monte Cruise在僅9次出賽中也曾3度掄元。牠自7月於鷹園馬場在8駒中包尾後便未再上陣，為備戰此次復出，已於此賽道參加兩次試閘，先是在週六於懷昂取勝的Petticoat之後跑獲第二，之後再贏出最近一次試閘。

梅菲爾德－史密斯將於當天最後一匹出賽馬完成佈陣，屆時他將再次與博伊德合作，由她策騎Cardsharp出戰Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58讓賽（1305公尺）。

科夫斯港將於週日恢復舉行賽事。

Ausbred Yahoo近期表現穩定，三仗前在肯普西取得第三名，其後於科夫斯港連續兩仗跑獲亞軍，最近一次正是敗給本週日將再度碰頭的Caledonian。

梅菲爾德－史密斯亦將與另一位見習騎師、可減磅3公斤的莉安・博伊德合作，安排Never Island角逐Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks雌馬Benchmark 58讓賽（1305公尺）。

Never Island在15次出賽中取得3勝，經博伊德減磅後，本場負重為59.5公斤。牠此前在格拉夫頓以不足一個馬位之差不敵Montgomery、跑獲亞軍，接著上仗於科夫斯港再以不足一個馬位之差落後In The Fine Print，名列第五。

雷蒙德・史波克斯將策騎梅菲爾德－史密斯馬房的Monte Cruise，出戰O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82讓賽（1205公尺）。

Monte Cruise同樣在僅9次出賽中贏得3場頭馬。牠自7月在鷹園馬場於8駒中包尾後便未再上陣，為備戰此次復出，已在此地進行兩次試閘，先是在週六懷昂頭馬Petticoat之後取得第二，其後在最近一次試閘中勝出。

梅菲爾德－史密斯當天最後一匹上陣馬將再次與博伊德合作，由她策騎Cardsharp出戰Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58讓賽（1305公尺）。

source_doc:
Tinkering with my stereo system this week has got me thinking about an oddity that I've never been able to get to the bottom of...let's see if the Mastodon hive mine can help.
The amp is a Philips FA454 and the CD Player is a Philips CD150.
According to the amp manual I can connect the units with a "8-pole DIN to 5-pole DIN + 2 x single-pole CINCH" cable."
I take this to mean an 8 pin din to a 5 pin + stereo RCA cable...which sounds cursed.
Never been able to find one. Can anyone make one?

The service manual for the amp is nice and clear (picture 2 in above toot), but I can't find anything as nice for the CD player. I've attached a picture (picture 4 in the above toot) from the service manual that I *think* is the relevant section.
Currently I have the CD player hooked up with just the RCA cables and it all works fine, but if I could find/make the correct Din to Din + RCA cable then I could use some additional functionality and free up the only RCA stereo inputs on my amp.

There's a repair café this weekend in the town where I live...if I'm still puzzling over it all by then I might take it all along there and see if they can help me hack together a cable.

hypo_0:
這週在那邊弄我的音響系統，結果讓我一直想到一個我怎樣都搞不懂的怪問題……來看看 Mastodon 上的大家能不能幫忙。
擴大機是 Philips FA454，CD 播放器是 Philips CD150。
照擴大機說明書寫的，我可以用一條「8 極 DIN 轉 5 極 DIN + 2 x 單極 CINCH」線把這兩台接起來。"
我理解的意思是 8 針 DIN 轉 5 針 DIN + 立體聲 RCA 線……聽起來超邪門。
我一直都找不到這種線。有人會做嗎？

擴大機的維修手冊寫得很清楚（上面那篇 toot 的第 2 張圖），但 CD 播放器我就找不到這麼清楚的資料。我附了一張維修手冊的圖（上面那篇 toot 的第 4 張圖），我*覺得*那應該就是相關的部分。
現在我只是用 RCA 線把 CD 播放器接上，一切都運作正常，但如果我能找到／做出正確的 Din 轉 Din + RCA 線，就能用到一些額外功能，還可以空出我擴大機上唯一一組 RCA 立體聲輸入。

這週末我住的鎮上有 repair café……如果到時候我還是在卡這件事，可能會把整套帶去那邊，看看他們能不能幫我土炮拼一條線出來。

擴大機的維修手冊寫得很清楚（上面那則 toot 的第 2 張圖），但 CD 播放器這邊我就找不到一樣清楚的資料了。我附了一張維修手冊裡的圖片（上面那則 toot 的第 4 張圖），我*猜*這應該就是相關的部分。
目前我只用 RCA 線接 CD 播放器，而且一切都運作正常；不過如果能找到／做出正確的 DIN 轉 DIN + RCA 線，我就可以用到一些額外功能，也能空出擴大機上唯一一組 RCA 立體聲輸入。

這週末我住的鎮上有個 repair café……如果到時我還是想不透，可能就會把整套帶過去，看看他們能不能幫我土砲拼出一條線。

source_doc:
@kagan Just use anything, even the cashier receipts from your grocery shopping - whatever you want. A friend of mine who exhibits a lot put a sheet of toilet roll from every place he's exhibiting in his scrapbook another friend got injured while hanging her frames and eventually used the cast from the injury and some gouache to stamp patters on the pages. Hence: everything's involved you want involved.

@aurora And then you... take all these things, and glue, staple, or otherwise attach them into a book? Is that it?
I'm unclear on what happens next, or why.
Honestly, I may just not be a scrapbooking person.

@kagan Yes, that's exactly the way to go! Intentionally spill your coffee, drop an ink cartridge... whatever suits you. One just needs to get all these fancy ideas shown on pinterest or whatever out of one's head. It's about documenting the process instead of being a visual dainty. Use it like a wrecking journal if that suits. It's totally up to the person who makes it.

source_doc:
@JugglingWithEggs at least in my friend circle mobile phones not uncommon from early 90s, but they cost a *lot* to call from a landline (so if you were living at home your parents would discourage it), and until 1995-1999 were insecure, anyone with a radio scanner could (and often did) listen to them.
Whilst radio scanners were out of the price range of youths, many older folk had them, and until late 90s were often the kind of radio enthusiast who was a Tory bootlicker and supported the Police and other Establishment organisations, so you if discussing anything subversive on a mobile phone you risked being grassed up..
Ironically the tide turned by late 90s when scanners became affordable, and the Police were still on analogue radios 😁

@JugglingWithEggs by late 1990s everyone had a mobile phone and calls were cheaper (often with a good amount of free minutes) but SMS messages were unreliable and initially didn't even work across networks - people actually talked to each other on them!
One difference was access to physical spaces wasn't as heavily controlled as today - even though there was still CCTV and locals would call old bill on youths "hanging around", there was neither sufficient boots on the ground nor interconnected CCTV (a real security guard had to watch the footage locally, and property owners generally didn't want to pay for these folk at evenings and weekends.
There were also fewer cops on duty in outer suburbs during nights/weekends - they were all deployed into the town centres)

@vfrmedia
I remember texts sometimes taking hours to come through in the early noughties - so not always great for making on the fly arrangements.
Living in market town definitely meant less cctv and coppers back in 90’s. Remember difference when heading out into Bournemouth or Norwich of an evening. But young people having fun wasn’t frowned upon like it is now. My earlier post about facial recognition was about area where there has been uptick in teens just hanging out.

hypo_0:
@JugglingWithEggs 至少在我的朋友圈裡，從 90 年代初開始手機就不算少見了，但用市話打給手機超級貴（所以如果你還住家裡，爸媽通常都會勸你不要打），而且在 1995-1999 年之前也不安全，任何有無線電掃描器的人都可以（而且常常真的會）偷聽到。
雖然無線電掃描器對年輕人來說貴到買不起，但很多年紀大一點的人都有，而且直到 90 年代末，這些人通常也都是那種無線電愛好者、保守黨舔狗，支持警察和其他體制內組織，所以如果你用手機聊什麼顛覆性的事，就有可能被打小報告。。
諷刺的是，到了 90 年代末風向反而變了，因為掃描器變得買得起了，而警察用的還是類比無線電 😁

@JugglingWithEggs 到了 1990 年代後期，大家都有手機了，通話也變便宜了（通常還會送不少免費分鐘數），但簡訊很不可靠，一開始甚至連跨電信網路都不能傳——那時候大家還真的會拿手機來講電話！
有個差別是，那時候要進出實體空間還不像現在這樣被嚴格管控——雖然當時還是有監視器，而且當地人也會因為年輕人「在那邊晃」就報警，但現場根本沒有那麼多人力，也沒有彼此串聯的監視系統（真的得有保全在現場盯著畫面看，而屋主通常也不想花錢請這些人晚上和週末值班。
而且在外圍郊區，夜間／週末值勤的警察也比較少——他們全都被派去市中心了）

@vfrmedia
我記得 2000 年代初期，簡訊有時候會拖好幾個小時才收到——所以臨時約真的不一定好用。
住在市集小鎮，在 90 年代確實就代表監視器和警察都比較少。我還記得晚上去伯恩茅斯或諾里奇時，那種差別很明顯。可是年輕人玩得開心，不像現在這樣會被白眼。我前一篇提到人臉辨識，是在說有些地區只是青少年聚在一起晃晃，最近卻變得更常被盯上。
hypo_1:
@JugglingWithEggs 至少在我的朋友圈裡，早在 90 年代初手機就不算罕見了，但從市話打到手機要花超～多錢（所以如果你還住家裡，爸媽通常都會勸你別打），而且在 1995-1999 年以前也不安全，任何手上有無線電掃描器的人都能偷聽到（而且還真的常常有人這樣做）。
雖然無線電掃描器對年輕人來說貴到買不起，但很多年紀大一點的人都有，而且一直到 90 年代末，這些人往往就是那種無線電迷、保守黨舔狗，支持警察和其他體制組織，所以你如果在手機上聊什麼比較反叛、顛覆性的內容，就有可能被打小報告。
諷刺的是，到了 90 年代末情勢反而翻轉了，因為掃描器變得人人買得起，但警察那邊還在用類比無線電 😁

@JugglingWithEggs 到了 1990 年代後期，幾乎人人都有手機，通話也便宜多了（通常還會附不少免費分鐘），但簡訊很不可靠，一開始甚至連跨電信網路都不能互傳——大家那時候還真的會拿手機來講電話！
另一個差別是，當時對實體空間的進出沒有像現在這樣管得那麼嚴——雖然那時候還是有監視器，而且當地人也會因為年輕人「在那邊晃來晃去」就報警，但不管是現場警力還是彼此連動的監視系統都沒那麼到位（監視畫面得真的有保全在現場盯著看，而屋主通常也不想花錢請人顧晚上跟週末。
而且外圍郊區在夜間／週末值勤的警察也比較少——他們都被調去鎮中心了）

@vfrmedia
我記得在 2000 年代初，簡訊有時候會拖好幾個小時才收到——所以要拿來臨時約人也不一定好用。
住在集鎮的話，90 年代那時候真的就代表監視器和警察都比較少。我還記得晚上跑去伯恩茅斯或諾里奇時，那種差別很明顯。不過那時候年輕人出去玩、不鬧事，還不會像現在這樣被嫌東嫌西。我前面那篇提到人臉辨識，是在講某些地方最近連青少年只是聚在一起晃晃，這種情況都明顯變多了。
hypo_2:
@JugglingWithEggs 至少在我的朋友圈裡，早從 90 年代初開始，手機就不算少見了，但從市話打到手機要花 *超多* 錢（所以如果你還住家裡，爸媽通常都會叫你別打），而且在 1995 到 1999 年前後以前，通話其實也不安全，任何有無線電掃描器的人都能偷聽到（而且很多人真的會這樣做）。
雖然無線電掃描器貴到不是年輕人買得起的東西，但不少年紀大一點的人都有，而且一直到 90 年代末，這些人很多都是那種無線電迷、保守黨馬屁精，挺警察也挺其他體制內組織，所以如果你用手機聊什麼比較反骨、顛覆性的話題，就有可能被檢舉。
諷刺的是，到了 90 年代末情勢反而反過來了——掃描器變便宜了，警察卻還在用類比無線電 😁

source_doc:
painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [1/x]
I figured it'd be fun to share the whole process that goes into making a painting a custom scene. could be useful to some, and entertaining to others :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVE & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
as you all know, I'm a deeply religious person 🛐 so..
the scene: we're in the garden of eden. adam is eating apples from the forbidden tree, because of course he is. eve is having none of his shit, grabs an unfortunate unsuspecting nearby serpent, and is about to whip the shit out of adam. 🐍
#painting

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [2/x]
so, we're gonna need reference photos. I want eve to be in the process of swinging the serpent around; so then I figured a baseball batter would be a good fit.
so wading through the AI slop, I found this actual photo that has a nice pose and good lighting.

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [3/x]
I want adam to be in a protective stance, while also holding a forbidden apple, and all this, seen from the side/back. also, the lighting has to come from the same side as the batter. so all and all, it's pretty hard to find a proper reference pic for this, so I am posing for this one myself.
took about 20 pics with slightly different in stances etc., and decided on this one. (the right hand is going to hold the apple)

source_doc:
(1/?)
@lorry
> Bumble is dire at Trust and Safety
Care to expand on that or link me?
> Whitney (Bumble) [is] a billionaire anyway, so what does she care?
I presume she didn't found Bumble by herself, maybe wasn't even part of the original group (as with Melon Husk and Tesla). What about the rest of them?
@screwlisp

(2/?)
@lorry
> I imagine there's still space for going back to the old model
There's plenty of new models to be tried that would be a huge improvement over playing hashtag roulette, either on DataFarms or decentralised social networks. One idea I saw was online dating as a group-based social experience. This is a handwave in the right direction. As is @cy's idea about matchmakers in another branch of this thread.

(3/?)
Speaking of roulette, what about a Chat Roulette style speed-dating app?
The app could;
* perform some basic T&S vetting (to minimise unsolicited dick-cam, etc), including confirming what general area you're in (ask me how!)
* throw you into a round of realtime speed dating with others in your area (text? Voice? Video? see 4/4).
* As with normal speed dating, if you both Favourite each other after talking, you get each others' contacts
#OnlineDating #ChatRoulette

@strypey I nearly joined #Chatroulette, but then Covid and the Ukraine war started, so that never went anywhere. I had a different direction I wanted to take them, though.
#Bumble #TrustAndSafety ? Well, the industry isn't exactly full of dating site whistleblowers, but safety workers in the industry do talk to me. I know more than I would ever want to know about the inside workings of most dating sites, and sadly. It's not really an amazing revelation that Bumble is as bad as the rest, though.
None of the dating sites puts more than a veneer of effort into T&S. They weigh the cost of litigation against the cost of actually doing the work, and so far, litigation costs have always been lower.

@lorry
> he industry isn't exactly full of dating site whistleblowers
Any particular reason for that?
> They weigh the cost of litigation against the cost of actually doing the work, and so far, litigation costs have always been lower
Huh. The Fight Club principle at work. Sad. We deserve better from our digital matchmaking tools.

(1/?)
@lorry
> Bumble 在信任與安全這塊超爛
方便多講一點，或丟個連結給我嗎？
> 反正 Whitney（Bumble）本來就是億萬富翁了，她哪會在乎？
我猜她也不是自己一個人創辦 Bumble 的，搞不好甚至不是最初那批人之一（就像 Melon Husk 跟 Tesla 那樣）。那其他人呢？
@screwlisp

(2/?)
@lorry
> 我想應該還是有空間可以回到舊模式
其實還有很多新模式可以試，而且都會比在 DataFarms 或去中心化社群網路上玩 hashtag 輪盤好非常多。我看過一個點子，是把網路交友做成以群體為基礎的社交體驗。這方向算是有點抓到重點。這串裡另一個分支中 @cy 提到媒人的想法也是。

@screwlisp

(2/?)
@lorry
> 我想應該還是有空間回到舊模式
其實還有很多新模式可以試，不管是在 DataFarms 還是去中心化社群網路上，都會比現在這種玩 hashtag 輪盤的方式好太多。我看過一個點子，是把線上交友做成一種以群體為基礎的社交體驗。雖然還只是個大方向，但路子是對的。這串裡另一個分支中，@cy 提到媒人機制的想法也是。

(3/?)
說到輪盤，那做個 Chat Roulette 風格的快速約會 app 怎麼樣？
這個 app 可以；
* 做一些基本的 T&S 審核（盡量減少那種沒人想看的屌照／屌視訊突然跳出來之類的），也包括確認你大概在哪個區域（想知道怎麼做就問我！）
* 把你丟進一輪和你所在地區其他人的即時快速約會（文字？語音？視訊？見 4/4）
* 跟一般快速約會一樣，如果你們聊完後彼此都加對方最愛，就能拿到彼此的聯絡方式
#線上交友 #ChatRoulette

@strypey 我那時候差點就加入 #Chatroulette，但後來 Covid 跟烏克蘭戰爭爆發，所以這件事最後就沒下文了。不過，我本來是想把它帶往另一個方向。
#Bumble #信任與安全？嗯，這個產業裡確實沒多少交友網站的吹哨者，不過業界做安全工作的人倒是會來跟我聊。我知道的大多數交友網站內部運作，已經比我這輩子想知道的還多了，可悲的是，Bumble 跟其他家一樣糟，這其實也不是什麼驚人爆料。
沒有任何一家交友網站在 T&S 上投入的努力超過表面功夫。他們會把訴訟成本拿去跟真正把事情做好所需的成本相比，而到目前為止，打官司的成本一直都比較低。

@lorry
> 這個產業裡確實沒多少交友網站的吹哨者
這有什麼特別的原因嗎？
> 他們會把訴訟成本拿去跟真正把事情做好所需的成本相比，而到目前為止，打官司的成本一直都比較低
喔。這就是《鬥陣俱樂部》原則在運作。真讓人難過。我們值得擁有更好的數位配對工具。

source_doc:
Good Morning Worlds!
We are going to the tip this morning. It will clear some of the stuff we sorted yesterday from the drive. I don't think we can clear it all unless we took the trailer, but the trailer is full of steel for weighing in.
Later I might carry on packing tote crates.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Tip trip done, and another car load cleared out.
I have taken the new trailer axle, and trailer drive motor system, out of the scrap metal trailer load. That means we can get more scrap metal in there and also not accidentally weigh in the parts I want to keep.
I think, next, I will start moving the scrap steel from the back garden into the trailer so that it is ready to go.
Scrap steel prices are not very high at the moment but better than nothing, if I take enough of it in one go.
Still have to sort the non-ferrous scrap.

That thing when you are taking the rotten tyres off small, wide lawn tractor wheels....
Huge effort to unmount one side of the tyre, but it was really badly rusted tight on the other side of the rim.
In the time it took me to break the bead free, I'd forgotten I had already done the other side, and ended up with the rim free but completely inside the tyre!
I had to remount the tyre that side, and then work around it to get the rim out.
I had to cut up the inner tube to get that out too!
I wonder how many more tyres I need to unmount? Four done so far.

hypo_0:
大家早安！
我們今天早上要去垃圾場。這樣可以把昨天從車道整理出來的一些東西清掉。我覺得除非把拖車也開去，不然沒辦法一次清完，但拖車裡現在裝滿了要拿去秤重賣掉的廢鋼。
晚一點我可能會繼續打包收納箱。
#大家早安

垃圾場這趟搞定了，又清掉了一車的東西。
我已經把新的拖車車軸，還有拖車驅動馬達系統，從那車廢金屬拖車載貨裡拿出來了。這樣一來裡面就能再多裝一些廢金屬，也不會不小心把我想留的零件一起拿去秤重賣掉。
我想接下來要開始把後院的廢鋼搬進拖車，這樣就能準備好載去。
現在廢鋼價格不是很好，但如果一次載夠多去賣，多少還是有點價值。
還是得整理一下非鐵類廢料。

就是那種你在拆小型寬輪草坪曳引機輪胎上那些爛掉的輪胎時會遇到的事....
光拆下輪胎一側就費了超大力氣，但另一側又因為生鏽卡在輪框上卡得超死。
等我把胎唇撬開時，已經忘記另一邊其實早就拆好了，結果變成輪框脫開了，卻整個卡在輪胎裡面！
我還得先把那一側的輪胎重新裝回去，然後再慢慢處理把輪框弄出來。
我連內胎都得剪開才能弄出來！
不知道我還有多少條輪胎要拆？目前拆了四條。

#大家早安啊

我想接下來會開始把後院的廢鋼搬進拖車，這樣就可以隨時出發。
現在廢鋼的價格不算高，不過如果一次載夠多去賣，多少還是比沒有好。
非鐵類廢料還是得再整理一下。

就是那種你在拆小台寬輪草坪曳引機輪胎上那些爛掉的輪胎時會發生的事....
拆掉輪胎一側就已經費了超大一番工夫，結果另一側還因為生鏽，死死咬在輪框上。
等我好不容易把胎唇撬開時，已經忘了另一邊其實早就拆好了，結果就變成輪框是鬆開了，卻整個跑到輪胎裡面！
我只好先把那一側的輪胎重新裝回去，然後再慢慢把輪框弄出來。

不知道我還要再拆幾條輪胎？目前拆了四條。

就是那種你在把爛掉的輪胎從小型寬胎草坪車輪框上拆下來時會遇到的事....
光是一側輪胎拆下來就費了超大力氣，結果另一側又因為鏽得太嚴重，整個死死卡在輪框上。
等我好不容易把胎唇鬆開時，已經忘了另一邊其實早就拆好了，結果變成輪框雖然鬆了，卻整個卡進輪胎裡面！
我只好先把那一側的輪胎重新裝回去，然後再慢慢把輪框弄出來。
連內胎我都得剪開才能拿出來！
不知道我還得再拆幾條輪胎？目前拆了四條。

大家早安啊！
我們今天早上要去垃圾場，這樣就能把昨天在車道上整理出來的一些東西清掉。我覺得除非把拖車一起帶去，不然應該沒辦法一次清完，但拖車裡現在已經裝滿了準備拿去秤重的廢鋼。
晚點我可能會繼續裝整理箱。
#大家早安

垃圾場這趟跑完了，又清掉一車。
我已經把新的拖車車軸，還有拖車驅動馬達系統，從那車準備當廢鐵回收的東西裡先拿出來了。這樣一來，裡面就能再多塞一些廢金屬，也不會不小心把我想留的零件一起拿去秤掉。
我想接下來會開始把後院的廢鋼搬上拖車，這樣就可以準備載去了。

source_doc:
The Case for Impeaching Donald Trump

Bombs over Latin America: It's giving Wag the Dog, if you ask me. The administration, seemingly hot to bring back neoconservative military conquest, soft-launched its latest regime change war in Venezuela by making indiscriminate attacks on boats in the Caribbean and Pacific waters off of Central America. These attacks, all undertaken without a jot of congressional oversight and on the dubious premise that the boats were packed with fentanyl bound for the United States, were murderous on their own. But the news that the military was ordered to strike an already stricken boat in a "double tap" attack to kill any survivors has raised the specter of war crimes - and in a way that even many Republicans don't seem ready to countenance.

Trump's Binance buddy gets a pardon: Changpeng Zhao began this year the disgraced former CEO of Binance, the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange, having done prison time for, as the Biden DOJ put it, "failing to maintain an effective anti-money laundering (AML) program," violating the Bank Security Act, and allowing money to flow freely to a host of bad actors, including "terrorists, cybercriminals, and child abusers." But Zhao, having forfeited the right to run Binance, wanted back in. So he used his connections to Trump's family and inner circle to secure a pardon that would let him run the show again. In return, Zhao showered his attention on World Liberty Financial - using Binance's leverage to enrich Trump's private crypto fund. TNR's Tim Noah was positively apoplectic about the shady arrangement.

Chips to China: Speaking of Tim Noah and apoplexy: It's probably not great that one firm, Nvidia, has come to possess such godlike, market-moving power. Its outsize importance to the global economy had Noah fingering it as one of the major pillars to crumble, when he gamed out a potential Trump stock market crash back in October. Trump's been doing what he can to boost Nvidia's fortunes, however: This year, the president broke with long-standing national security tradition and announced that he was permitting the firm to sell its H200 chips to China. As The New York Times" David Sanger noted, the deal - the fruits of "intense lobbying" from Nvidia CEO and White House gadfly Jensen Huang - raised a basic question: "If the chips that power the most advanced technology can be sold to the United States" chief technological, military and financial competitor, where is the new line drawn?" That's probably the least of Trump's concerns, however: The deal also guaranteed that "25 percent of all the revenues from the sales would go to the United States," in yet another case of this administration's affection for fascist corporatism.

hypo_0:
支持彈劾唐納．川普的理由

拉丁美洲上空的炸彈：如果你問我，這簡直就是《桃色風雲搖擺狗》。這個政府顯然急於讓新保守主義式的軍事征服捲土重來，先是在中美洲外海的加勒比海與太平洋水域，對船隻發動無差別攻擊，藉此低調展開其最新一場在委內瑞拉推動政權更替的戰爭。這些攻擊全都在國會毫無監督的情況下進行，而且所憑藉的理由也相當可疑——聲稱那些船隻滿載運往美國的芬太尼——其本身就已是致命暴行。然而，如今傳出軍方曾被下令對一艘原已遭重創的船隻進行「雙重打擊」，以殺死任何生還者，這使戰爭罪的陰影浮現——而且嚴重到似乎連許多共和黨人都難以容忍。

川普的幣安好友獲得赦免：趙長鵬在今年年初時，還是全球最大加密貨幣交易所幣安聲名狼藉的前執行長，並且已因拜登司法部所稱「未能維持有效的反洗錢（AML）計畫」、違反《銀行保密法》，以及放任資金自由流向包括「恐怖分子、網路犯罪者與虐童者」在內的諸多不法分子而服刑。但趙長鵬在喪失經營幣安的權利後，仍想重掌大局。於是，他利用自己與川普家族及核心圈子的關係，爭取到一項赦免，讓他得以再次掌控局面。作為回報，趙長鵬將大量關注與資源投注於 World Liberty Financial——利用幣安的影響力，為川普的私人加密貨幣基金牟利。《新共和》雜誌的提姆．諾亞對這項可疑安排憤怒至極。

晶片輸中：說到提姆．諾亞的憤怒：大概不是什麼好事的是，單一公司輝達如今竟掌握了如此近乎神祇、足以撼動市場的力量。它對全球經濟的重要性之大，甚至讓諾亞在去年10月推演川普可能引發的股市崩盤時，將其視為最可能倒下的主要支柱之一。不過，川普一直在盡其所能提振輝達的前景：今年，這位總統打破長年國家安全慣例，宣布允許該公司向中國出售其 H200 晶片。正如《紐約時報》的大衛．桑格所指出，這筆交易——在輝達執行長、白宮熟客黃仁勳「密集遊說」之下的成果——引發了一個根本問題：「如果驅動最先進技術的晶片可以賣給美國在科技、軍事與金融上的主要競爭對手，那麼新的界線究竟畫在哪裡？」不過，這大概不是川普最在意的事：這筆交易還保證「所有銷售收入的25%將流向美國政府」，再次展現本屆政府對法西斯式國家企業主義的偏愛。

hypo_2:
彈劾唐納．川普的理由

拉丁美洲上空的炸彈：若你問我，這活脫就是《桃色風雲搖擺狗》的情節。這個政府似乎一心想讓新保守主義式的軍事征服死灰復燃，先是在中美洲外海的加勒比海與太平洋水域，對船隻發動無差別攻擊，藉此低調展開其最新一場在委內瑞拉推動政權更替的戰爭。這些攻擊全都在毫無國會監督的情況下進行，且所依據的理由也相當可疑——聲稱那些船隻載滿了運往美國的芬太尼——單就其本身而言，就已經是致命暴行。然而，如今又傳出軍方曾被下令對一艘本已遭重創的船隻發動「雙重打擊」，以殲滅任何生還者。這讓戰爭罪的陰影浮現——而且嚴重到似乎連不少共和黨人都難以容忍。

川普的幣安麻吉獲得赦免：趙長鵬在今年年初時，還是全球最大加密貨幣交易所幣安一名聲名狼藉的前執行長，且已因拜登司法部所稱「未能維持有效的反洗錢（AML）機制」、違反《銀行保密法》，以及放任資金自由流向包括「恐怖分子、網路犯罪者與虐童者」在內的眾多不法分子而入監服刑。然而，趙長鵬在喪失經營幣安的權利後，仍想重返權力核心。於是，他運用自己與川普家族及其核心圈的關係，取得一項赦免，讓他得以再次掌控局面。作為回報，趙長鵬大力關照 World Liberty Financial——利用幣安的影響力為川普的私人加密貨幣基金牟利。《新共和》雜誌的提姆．諾亞對這項見不得光的安排顯然氣炸了。

晶片輸中：說到提姆．諾亞的怒火——單一企業輝達如今竟握有這般近乎神祇、足以撼動市場的力量，恐怕不是什麼好事。輝達對全球經濟的重要性之大，甚至讓諾亞在去年10月推演川普可能引發的股市崩盤時，將其指為可能倒下的主要支柱之一。然而，川普一直在盡其所能提振輝達的利益：今年，這位總統打破長年以來的國安慣例，宣布允許該公司向中國出售其 H200 晶片。正如《紐約時報》的大衛．桑格所指出，這筆交易——出自輝達執行長、白宮常客黃仁勳「密集遊說」的成果——引出了一個根本問題：「如果驅動最先進技術的晶片可以賣給美國在科技、軍事與金融上的主要競爭對手，那麼新的紅線究竟畫在哪裡？」不過，這大概不是川普最在意的事：這筆交易還保證「所有銷售收入的25%將歸美國所有」，再一次顯示本屆政府對法西斯式國家企業主義的偏愛。
hypo_3:
彈劾唐納．川普的理由

拉丁美洲上空的炸彈：如果你問我，這簡直就是《桃色風雲搖擺狗》翻版。這個政府顯然熱中於讓新保守主義式的軍事征服捲土重來，先是在中美洲外海的加勒比海與太平洋水域對船隻發動無差別攻擊，藉此低調啟動其在委內瑞拉推動政權更替的最新戰爭。這些攻擊全都在毫無國會監督的情況下進行，而且所依據的理由也相當可疑——聲稱那些船隻載滿了運往美國的芬太尼——單憑這一點，就已構成致命暴行。然而，如今又傳出軍方曾被下令對一艘本已受創的船隻發動「雙重打擊」，以殺死任何倖存者。這使戰爭罪的陰影愈發逼近——而且其程度之嚴重，似乎連許多共和黨人都難以接受。

川普的幣安麻吉獲得赦免：全球最大加密貨幣交易所幣安的前執行長趙長鵬，在今年年初還是個聲名狼藉的人物；他此前已因拜登司法部所稱「未能維持有效的反洗錢（AML）機制」、違反《銀行保密法》，以及放任資金自由流向包括「恐怖分子、網路犯罪者與虐童者」在內的各類不法分子，而服過牢獄之刑。然而，在失去經營幣安的權利後，趙長鵬仍想重返舞台。於是，他利用自己與川普家族及其核心圈的關係，取得了一項赦免，讓他得以再次掌控大局。作為回報，趙長鵬將大量心力投入 World Liberty Financial——利用幣安的影響力為川普的私人加密貨幣基金牟利。《新共和》雜誌的提姆．諾亞對這項見不得光的安排可說是怒不可遏。

晶片輸中：說到提姆．諾亞的怒火——單一企業輝達如今竟握有如此近乎神一般、足以牽動市場的權力，恐怕絕非好事。輝達對全球經濟的重要性之高，甚至讓諾亞在去年10月推演川普可能引發的股市崩盤時，將其列為可能倒下的主要支柱之一。不過，川普一直在盡其所能提振輝達的利益：今年，這位總統打破長年以來的國安慣例，宣布允許該公司向中國出售其 H200 晶片。正如《紐約時報》的大衛．桑格所指出，這筆交易——也就是輝達執行長、白宮常客黃仁勳「密集遊說」的成果——引出了一個根本問題：「如果驅動最先進技術的晶片可以賣給美國在科技、軍事與金融上的主要競爭對手，那麼新的紅線究竟畫在哪裡？」不過，這大概不是川普最在意的事：這筆交易還保證「所有銷售收入的25%將歸美國所有」，再一次展現本屆政府對法西斯式國家企業主義的偏愛。

hypothesis:
彈劾唐納．川普的理由

拉丁美洲上空的炸彈：要我說，這簡直像極了《搖擺狗》。這屆政府似乎亟欲讓新保守主義式的軍事征服捲土重來，先是在中美洲外海的加勒比海與太平洋海域，對船隻發動無差別攻擊，低調揭開其最新一場針對委內瑞拉的政權更替戰爭。這些攻擊全都在毫無國會監督的情況下進行，而且所憑藉的理由也相當可疑——聲稱那些船隻滿載運往美國的芬太尼——僅此一點，就已足以構成致命暴行。然而，如今又傳出軍方曾被下令對一艘早已遭重創的船隻發動「二次打擊」，意圖殲滅任何倖存者。這使戰爭罪的陰影浮上檯面，而且其嚴重程度，似乎連許多共和黨人都不願接受。

川普的幣安麻吉獲得赦免：全球最大加密貨幣交易所幣安的前執行長趙長鵬，在今年年初還是一名聲名狼藉的人物；此前他已因拜登司法部所稱「未能維持有效的反洗錢（AML）機制」、違反《銀行保密法》，以及放任資金自由流向包括「恐怖分子、網路犯罪分子與兒童性侵害者」在內的各類不法分子，而服過刑。然而，在喪失經營幣安的權利之後，趙長鵬仍想重返局中。於是，他利用自己與川普家族及其核心圈的關係，取得一項可讓他再次掌控大局的赦免。作為回報，趙長鵬大力扶持 World Liberty Financial——利用幣安的影響力為川普的私人加密貨幣基金牟利。《新共和》雜誌的提姆．諾亞對這項可疑安排可說是怒不可遏。

晶片輸中：說到提姆．諾亞的怒火——單一企業輝達如今竟掌握如此近乎神一般、足以撼動市場的力量，恐怕不是什麼好事。輝達對全球經濟的重要性之大，甚至讓諾亞在去年10月推演川普可能引發的股市崩盤時，將其點名為可能倒下的主要支柱之一。然而，川普一直在盡其所能提振輝達的利益：今年，這位總統打破長年以來的國安慣例，宣布允許該公司向中國出售其 H200 晶片。正如《紐約時報》的大衛．桑格所指出，這筆交易——也就是輝達執行長、白宮常客黃仁勳「密集遊說」的成果——引出了一個根本問題：「如果驅動最尖端技術的晶片可以賣給美國在科技、軍事與金融上的主要競爭對手，那麼新的紅線究竟劃在哪裡？」然而，這大概不是川普最在意的事：這筆交易還保證「所有銷售收入的25%將歸美國所有」，再次顯示本屆政府對法西斯式國家企業主義的偏愛。

You went $0.06 over.
I need the $0.06.
But I only want $10 even.
You pumped 1006.
Then you should fix your pumps so they don't go so fast.
I'm on a fixed income, you know.
Lady, if you don't.

source_doc:
Nevada, the Silver State.
Yay!
Hey, honey.
We'll be there in about an hour.
Try to have a good attitude, honey.
So what's the plan with grandma?
I don't know.
Selling the ranch?
I don't know, but I don't see any other options.
I think she'll move and come live with us in LA.
I doubt it.
She likes the country.

@hannorein@mastodon.social sooo, we’re tagging verified human content now for them to have a dataset with less slop to train on?
I don’t know, they should asphyxiate from their own barfed up slop mess they’ve created until their latent vector space converges to unity.

@helpsterTee @hannorein My first thought as well. I killed off my personal site since I didn't want to feed the various Torment Nexuses. Marking genuine human content just makes building new, unpoisoned and slop free data sets easier.
I thought about doing the opposite and building a "poison pot" for AI crawlers but my poor little server is not that beefy.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social yeah, if we suffer, let them suffer.
If your employer stuffs AI in your daily routine, instead of resigning, use malicious compliance and apply it to totally mundane problems and embrace slightly-wrong answers while burning through corporate token credit to ruin quarterly performance.
I’m so fed up with this and they’re using it anyways against us, so let’s have a little fun, while we can 🫤
Edit: they’re making up numbers all the time and faking profits for a while now, the usage that’ll bankrupt your employer won’t place a dent at slop headquarters unprofitable scam business anyways or their forest burning slopetuum mobile.

The BBC not here yet.
There was a terrible queue at the chemist's, but I thought the occasion warranted a new comb.
Patricia, have you got nits?
No, I haven't got nits.
I've had my hair done.
I'm trying to look nice for the telly.
Patricia, the whole point of this exercise is to show us as we are.
What sort of example are you setting to the constable's?
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):

There's nothing else I can do.
Will you.
Will you let me know where you are?
Paul?
As soon as I know myself.

source_doc:
Ate a little more chicken and had a wash. Also had a little more fight when I made her take her fluids last.
We phoned the vet at 830 this morning to ask if they looked under her soft pallet while she was sedated, as she has major ear polyps. Was told the vet would call back. They didn't, rang just now (1645 local) and was told the vet wasn't in today. I was a bit annoyed and said "we paid you over £600 yesterday, you said phone if we have questions, we have questions you're not answering!"
"I don't like your tone, sir "
"It's not your fault personally, but when I pay the better part of a grand I expect a level of service that you're not providing"
"I'll get a vet from the other branch to ring you"

Seeing vet at other practise at half seven for more anti nausea medicine. They're not going to charge out of hours rate as we rang first thing.
Just got another 10ml of rescue fluids into her.

Back. Anti nausea jab, gabapentin, and she's home. Ate some chicken and some cheese.
Got more gabapentin in pill form for her, too

Won't stop eating. Having to slow her down to prevent her from vomiting. She's also absolutely, completely, totally, off her tits. Mullered. Stoned. Caned. Fully in the yellow submarine.
Vet says this'll reset her appetite, or, when we stop giving her painkillers, show it's pain stopping her eating, which would mean medical imaging time.

She's eating a bit, and even played a little, but she's still on the medications so it might be that. Still giving her recovery fluids, which she's still not fighting as she would normally.

Valencia has decided we are all Suspicious. Won't come when called, runs if you go to her. Still comes on her own terms, so it's fine, she's just seen her adoptive sister repeatedly wrapped in a towel and made to drink Stuff, and she wants none of that, thank you very much.

Ming update: she's a little more active, but still floppy and sleeping a lot. She's on two lots of painkillers still, so she's probably fairly stoned.
She IS eating, little and often, and finished off the last of her rescue fluids from a saucer by herself. She's washing, but she hasn't slapped valencia in ages, and she's still not right. Hoping it's the painkillers, and that when we withdraw them, her appetite remains.

Ming has finished the course of painkillers and is showing determined desire to go out, which we're not allowing yet. She's eating, playing, but it'll be a few days until the drugs are cleared from her system and we'll then see how she is.
Cautiously optimistic.
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0:
多吃了一點雞肉，也洗了洗。最後一次逼她喝補液的時候，她也稍微比較有力氣反抗了。
我們今天早上 8:30 打給獸醫，想問她鎮靜的時候有沒有順便看一下她的軟顎那邊，因為她耳朵裡有很嚴重的息肉。對方說獸醫會回電。結果沒有，剛剛（當地時間 16:45）又打過去，卻被告知獸醫今天沒上班。我有點火大，就說：「我們昨天付了你們超過 600 英鎊，你們還說有問題就打來，我們現在有問題，你們卻不回！」
「先生，我不喜歡你的語氣。」
「這不是你個人的錯，但我都快付到一千鎊了，我期待的是你們該有的服務水準，而你們現在根本沒做到。」
「我會請另一間分院的獸醫打給你。」

晚上七點半要去看另一家診所的獸醫，拿更多止吐藥。他們不會收夜間急診費，因為我們一大早就先打電話了。
剛剛又餵進去她 10ml 的救援補液。

回來了。打了止吐針、開了加巴噴丁，現在已經回家。吃了一些雞肉跟一些起司。
也另外拿了更多錠劑型的加巴噴丁給她

完全停不下來一直吃。還得控制一下她進食速度，免得她吐出來。而且她現在真的、徹底、完全嗨到不行。整個茫掉。超ㄎㄧㄤ。藥到飛天。直接搭上黃色潛水艇了。
獸醫說這樣可以重置她的食慾，或者等我們停掉止痛藥後，如果發現其實是疼痛讓她不吃，那就表示該安排醫學影像檢查了。

她有吃一點，也甚至玩了一下，但她現在還在吃藥，所以也可能是藥效。還是持續在給她補充恢復用的液體，而她現在也還是沒有像平常那樣強烈反抗。

Valencia 已經認定我們每個人都很可疑。叫她不來，你一靠近她她就跑。不過她還是會照自己的意思跑來，所以沒事啦，她只是看到自己的養姐妹一再被毛巾包起來、被逼著喝那些東西，她可一點都不想輪到自己，真的謝囉。

Ming 近況：她有比較活潑一點了，但還是軟趴趴的，也睡很多。她現在還在吃兩種止痛藥，所以大概也是滿茫的。
她有在吃，少量多餐，而且還自己把盤子裡最後剩下的救援補液喝完了。她也有在洗臉整理自己，但她已經好久沒賞 valencia 巴掌了，而且她還是沒有完全恢復正常。希望只是止痛藥的關係，也希望之後停藥了，她的食慾還能維持。

Ming 已經把整個止痛藥療程吃完了，現在很明顯很堅持想出去，但我們暫時還不准。她有在吃、有在玩，不過還要再過幾天，等藥物完全代謝掉，到時候就知道她真正狀況怎麼樣了。
先謹慎樂觀。
hypo_1:
又多吃了一點雞肉，也有稍微梳洗一下。最後一次餵她補液的時候，她也比較有力氣反抗了。
我們今天早上 8:30 打給獸醫，想問她鎮靜時有沒有順便看看軟顎下面，因為她耳朵裡有很嚴重的息肉。當時對方說獸醫會回電。結果根本沒回，剛剛（當地時間 16:45）又打去，才被告知獸醫今天根本不在。我有點不爽，就說：「我們昨天付了你們超過 600 英鎊，你們自己說有問題就打來，我們現在有問題，你們卻都不回！」
「先生，我不喜歡你的語氣。」
「這不是針對你個人，但我都花了快一千鎊了，期待的服務水準不是你們現在這樣。」
「我會請另一間分院的獸醫打給你。」

晚上七點半要去另一家診所看獸醫，拿更多止吐藥。因為我們一早就先打電話了，所以他們不會收非門診時間的費用。
剛剛又讓她喝進去了 10ml 的救援補液。

回來了。打了止吐針、拿了加巴噴丁，她也回家了。吃了一些雞肉跟一些起司。
另外也幫她拿了更多錠劑型的加巴噴丁

我們今天早上 8:30 打給獸醫，想問她在鎮靜時有沒有順便看看軟顎後面，因為她耳朵有很嚴重的息肉。對方當時說獸醫會回電。結果根本沒打來，我們剛剛又打了一次（當地時間 16:45），才被告知獸醫今天沒上班。我有點不爽，就說：「我們昨天才付了你們 600 多鎊，你們自己說有問題可以打來，我們現在有問題，你們卻完全沒回應！」
「先生，我不喜歡你的語氣。」
「這不是針對你個人，但我都花了快一千鎊了，期待的是你們現在根本沒提供的服務水準。」
「我會請另一間分院的獸醫回電給你。」

晚上七點半要去另一間診所看獸醫，拿更多止吐藥。因為我們一早就先打電話了，所以他們不會收夜間急診費。
剛剛又讓她補進去 10ml 的急救補液。

回來了。打了止吐針，拿了加巴噴丁，她也回家了。吃了一些雞肉和一些起司。
也另外幫她拿了更多錠狀的加巴噴丁

她現在完全停不下來一直吃。只好讓她吃慢一點，免得她吐出來。而且她現在真的是徹底、完全、百分之百地嗨到不行。茫爆了。ㄎㄧㄤ翻了。整個飛高高。完全開進黃色潛水艇。
獸醫說，這樣要嘛能把她的食慾重開機，要嘛等我們停掉止痛藥後，就能看出是不是疼痛讓她吃不下；如果是那樣，就得安排做影像檢查了。

她有吃一點，也甚至玩了一下，但她現在還在吃藥，所以也可能只是藥效的關係。我們還是持續在幫她補恢復液，而她也還是沒有像平常那樣反抗。

Valencia 已經認定我們每一個人都很可疑。叫她也不來，你一靠近她她就跑。不過她還是會照自己的意思主動靠過來，所以沒事啦，她只是看著她的養姐妹一次又一次被毛巾包起來，還被灌一些東西下去，這種事她可一點都不想沾，謝謝喔。

Ming 近況更新：她有比較活潑一點了，但還是軟趴趴的，也還是睡很多。她現在還在吃兩種止痛藥，所以大概還是滿茫的。
她真的有在吃，少量多餐，而且還自己把盤子裡最後剩下的急救補液喝完了。她也有在理毛，不過她已經很久沒甩 Valencia 巴掌了，而且整體還是不太對勁。希望只是止痛藥的關係，也希望等停藥之後，她的食慾還能維持住。

Ming 已經把止痛藥整個療程吃完了，現在非常明顯地一心想往外跑，但我們還不打算讓她出去。她有在吃，也有在玩，不過還要再過幾天，等藥物完全從她體內代謝掉之後，才能真正看出她狀況怎麼樣。
先保持審慎樂觀。

source_doc:
A couple of weeks ago, my boyfriend and I did pottery.
I mean, actual pottery.
And it's now time to collect our masterpieces.
So I'm in the office today, and it is literally just a 20 minute walk away from the office.
But the one time I went, I obviously used my phone map because I'd never been in that area before.
So let's hope I can remember some orientation skills and use this thing.
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0: 幾週前，我跟我男朋友一起去做陶藝，我是說，真的那種陶藝，現在終於到了要去領我們傑作的時候了，所以我今天人在辦公室，而那個地方離辦公室走路真的只要二十分鐘，但我上次去的時候，當然是用手機地圖，因為我以前從來沒去過那一帶，所以就希望我還記得一點辨別方向的能力，然後靠這個去找到路。
hypo_1: 幾週前，我跟我男朋友一起去做陶藝，我是說，真的那種做陶藝，現在終於到了去領我們傑作的時候了，所以我今天人在辦公室，那個地方離辦公室走路真的只要二十分鐘而已，但我唯一一次去的時候，當然是靠手機地圖，因為我以前從來沒去過那一帶，所以希望我還有點方向感，能靠這個找到路。
hypo_2: 幾週前，我跟我男朋友一起去做陶藝，我是說，是真的親手做陶器那種，現在終於到了去領我們傑作的時候了，所以我今天人在辦公室，而那個地方離辦公室走路真的只要二十分鐘，但我上次去的那一次，當然是用手機地圖，因為我之前從來沒去過那一帶，所以希望我的方向感還記得怎麼用，能靠這個順利找到路。
hypo_3: 幾個星期前，我跟我男朋友一起去做陶藝，是真的那種親手做陶器喔，現在終於到了去領我們那些傑作的時候了，所以我今天人在辦公室，而那個地方離辦公室真的走二十分鐘就到，但我唯一去過的那次，當然是靠手機地圖，因為我之前從來沒去過那一帶，所以就希望我的方向感還在，能靠這個順利找到路。

source_doc:
Progress after a while off. I got the sewing machine out to do the bill and a crown seam. Half the crown sewn plus the bill, resting atop the paper form made from the pattern. I had to rip and re-sew the machine stitch because I pinned along instead of across the seam and went off track. I might re-do the bill if I want a little more depth.
#millinery

Eight crown panels and two bill panels assembled into three pieces and pinned for general shape. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern in green velvet. Mostly machine stitched.
The pattern calls for topstitching along the seams of the crown panels, which might suggest either matching or contrasting thread.
#millinery

Top view before I sew the crown halves together. Reviewing the how-to video. I see Sachi is using a few tiny spring clips during sewing instead of pinning the whole seam.

A bit of a messy join on the eight panels coming together at the peak of the newsboy cap, so I am thinking a larger button may be in order to disguise the seams.

Crown fully pieced, with cloth covered.button at peak. Raw edges loosely tucked under. Seams neither pressed nor topstitched.
#millinery
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0:
休息一陣子後又有進度了。我把縫紉機拿出來做帽舌和帽冠接縫。帽冠縫好一半加上帽舌，放在用紙樣做成的紙模上面。我本來沿著接縫一路別針，沒有橫著別，結果車線跑掉，只好拆掉重車。我可能會重做帽舌，如果我想要再有一點深度的話。
#製帽

八片帽冠裁片和兩片帽舌裁片組成三個部分，先固定別針抓大致形狀。Sachi's Studio 的報童帽紙樣，用綠色天鵝絨做的。大部分都是用縫紉機車的。
這個紙樣有要求在帽冠裁片的接縫上壓明線，這樣看起來可能適合用同色線，或是對比色線。
#製帽

在我把兩半帽冠縫起來之前的頂視圖。正在重看教學影片。我看到 Sachi 縫的時候是用幾個小小的彈簧夾，不是把整條接縫都別滿針。

八片裁片在報童帽頂端會合的地方接得有點亂，所以我在想，也許該用一顆大一點的鈕扣來把接縫遮一下。

帽冠全部拼接完成，頂端有包布鈕扣。毛邊鬆鬆地收進去。接縫還沒熨平，也還沒壓明線。
#製帽
hypo_1:
停了一陣子後又有點進度了。我把縫紉機搬出來做帽舌和帽冠的一道接縫。帽冠縫好一半，加上帽舌，現在放在照著紙樣做出的紙模上。我得把車縫拆掉再重縫一次，因為我別針是順著接縫別，不是橫著別，結果就縫歪了。如果我想讓帽舌再深一點，可能會重做。
#製帽

八片帽冠裁片和兩片帽舌裁片先組成三個部分，並用別針固定出大致形狀。Sachi's Studio 的報童帽紙樣，用綠色絲絨製作。大部分都是用縫紉機車的。
紙樣有要求沿著帽冠裁片的接縫壓明線，所以感覺不管是配同色線還是對比色線都可以。
#製帽

把帽冠兩半縫合前的頂視圖。正在重看教學影片。我看到 Sachi 縫的時候是用幾個小小的彈簧夾，不是把整條接縫都別滿針。

八片裁片在報童帽頂端交會的地方接得有點亂，所以我在想，也許可以用一顆大一點的鈕扣來把接縫遮一下。

帽冠已經完整拼接好了，頂端有顆包布鈕扣。毛邊先鬆鬆地收進去。接縫還沒整燙，也還沒壓明線。
#製帽
hypo_2:
休息了一陣子後又有點進度了。我把縫紉機拿出來縫帽舌和帽冠的一道接縫。帽冠縫好一半，加上帽舌，現在正放在依紙樣做出的紙模上。我得把機縫拆掉重縫，因為我把珠針順著接縫別，而不是橫著別，結果就縫偏了。如果想讓帽舌再有一點深度，我可能會重做。
#製帽

八片帽冠裁片和兩片帽舌裁片先組成三個部分，並用珠針固定出大致形狀。Sachi's Studio 的報童帽紙樣，用綠色絲絨來做。大多數都是機縫。
紙樣有要求沿著帽冠裁片的接縫壓明線，所以看起來不管用同色線還是對比色線都可以。
#製帽

source_doc:
Once upon a time in a kingdom of great beauty.
There was a beast of a property market.
We have seen 40 houses.
The market's just too fast.
Prices are realistic.
If only there was a fearless hero to save the day.
I could kiss you.
Or a fairy godmother.
To make dreams come true.
Oh, angel.
But we live in the real world.
They'll just have to make do with us.
We're back.
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0:
從前，在一個非常美麗的王國裡。
那裡有個像野獸一樣的房市。
我們已經看了四十間房子。
市場真的跑得太快了。
價格很實在。
要是有個無所畏懼的英雄來拯救這一切就好了。
我真想親你一下。
或者來個仙女教母。
讓夢想成真。
喔，天使。
但我們活在現實世界裡。
他們只能將就找我們了。
我們回來了。

source_doc:
In a surprise Inspector Clouseau twist, I now have an extra thing to investigate for Spooky Kitties Sciences!
I was doing a quick scroll through the evenings secondary camera video, when I spotted a curious The Inspector standing on the trunk of the tree near the feeding station. Kept jumping around, finding him near where the magpies had been, so I initially suspect(edit) he was simply chasing them as they sometimes let him do, until I randomly chance stop...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

There Inspector Clouseau was, rolling around like crazing about 2 meters NE of the tree, mostly hidden by the unfortunate placement of the awnings east post. Still, there he was for 5 minutes, at which point he ran back up the tree, walked across the lawn to the hill, flattened himself at the bottom, and then ran off camera, presumably in the middle of The Zoomies.
2/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Now, as some of my Spooky Kitties Sciences readers may know, the motivations behind that tests are not just to entertain the kitties. While the most important aspect is the genuine curiosity I had seeing the kitties rolling around in the snow, I really wanted to find something that The Inspector liked. I came out of the initial testing with only a single moment to hint that he liked something. What that was is still a mystery.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

結果來了個超意外的克魯梭探長式轉折，我現在又多了一件要替 Spooky Kitties Sciences 調查的事！
我那時候只是快速滑一下傍晚那台副攝影機的影片，結果看到好奇的 Inspector 站在餵食站附近那棵樹的樹幹上。因為一直跳來跳去，又常在喜鵲待過的地方附近看到他，所以我一開始懷疑（修正）他只是像平常那樣在追牠們，直到我剛好隨機停住...
#詭異貓貓科學

然後，克魯梭探長 Inspector 就在那裡，在樹的東北方大概 2 公尺處瘋狂打滾，可惜大多被東邊棚架柱子那個很不巧的位置擋住了。不過，他確實在那裡滾了 5 分鐘，之後又跑回樹上，穿過草地走到小山坡，把自己壓低貼在底部，然後就衝出鏡頭了，八成正處於 The Zoomies 的正中間。
2/
#詭異貓貓科學

現在呢，有些 Spooky Kitties Sciences 的讀者可能知道，做那些測試的動機不只是想逗貓貓開心而已。雖然最重要的部分，還是我看到貓貓在雪地裡打滾時產生的真心好奇，但我其實真的很想找出 Inspector 到底喜歡什麼。我在最初的測試裡，只有抓到一個瞬間，隱約看得出他好像喜歡某個東西。至於那到底是什麼，到現在還是個謎。
3/

hypo_6:
沒想到竟然來了個克魯梭探長式的大轉折，現在我又多了一件可以替 Spooky Kitties Sciences 調查的事！
我那時正在快速滑過傍晚副攝影機拍到的影片，結果瞄到一臉好奇的 The Inspector 站在餵食站附近那棵樹的樹幹上。他一直跳來跳去，我也不斷在喜鵲剛剛待過的地方附近看到他，所以一開始我猜（更正）他大概就只是像平常偶爾那樣在追牠們，直到我剛好隨機停在某一幕...
#詭異貓貓科學

然後就看到 Inspector Clouseau 在那裡，距離那棵樹東北方大約 2 公尺處，像發瘋一樣滾來滾去，只是大部分畫面都被位置超不巧的東側棚架柱子擋住了。不過他確實就在那邊滾了整整 5 分鐘，接著又衝回樹上，穿過草地跑到小坡那裡，在坡底整個壓低身體，然後就衝出鏡頭了，八成正好進入 The Zoomies 模式。
2/
#詭異貓貓科學

現在，有些 Spooky Kitties Sciences 的讀者可能知道，做那些測試的動機不只是為了娛樂貓貓而已。雖然最重要的一點，還是我看到貓貓在雪地裡打滾時產生的那種真心好奇，但我其實真的很想找出 The Inspector 到底喜歡什麼。我在最初那輪測試裡，只得到一個短短的瞬間，隱約顯示他確實喜歡某樣東西。至於那到底是什麼，到現在還是個謎。
3/

source_doc:
Well, aren't you even going to look at me?
Sure.
You're too young to know anything about children.
I'm sure the agency said you were 25.
You're not 25, are you?
You're nothing like 25.
Have you ever had a job as a governess before?
No.
But have you ever had any kind of a job?
Yes, I have.
But don't you ever finish a sentence.
Yes, if I'm allowed to.
Okay, let's start all over.
Sit down.
Tell me about yourself.

Not only do you know exactly who you’re advertising to, but you also have a better understanding of how your ads are performing. All in all, you can make your messaging more powerful, leading to a better return on your advertising dollars.",
